# OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications for 2026

- Published date on page: `December 9, 2025`
- Category: `resources` / whitepapers-guides

## About (Extracted Body)

The OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications 2026 is presented as a globally peer-reviewed framework identifying critical security risks for autonomous and agentic AI systems. The page states it was developed with broad collaboration across industry experts, researchers, and practitioners, and is intended to provide practical guidance for securing AI agents that plan, act, and make decisions across complex workflows.

The writeup positions the Top 10 as an operational starting point for reducing agentic AI risk and improving deployment trustworthiness.
